LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF DAVID LEUNG'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IS OFF CALENDAR FOR DEPARTMENT 302. THE MOTION NEEDS TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE KATHLEEN KELLY, THE TRIAL JUDGE IN THIS CASE. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY SHOULD CONTACT THE COURTROOM CLERK IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 415-551-3771 TO ARRANGE A DATE AND TIME FOR THE HEARING. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY SHOULD ALSO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF ALL FILED PAPERS ON THE MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 220 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE DATE AND TIME FOR THE HEARING. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D302/HK).

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs; Memorandum In Support; Declaration Of Martin B. Greenbaum
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DAVID LEUNG'S Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs.

Off calendar for department 302. The motion needs to be heard by Judge Kathleen Kelly, the trial judge in this case. Counsel for the moving party should contact the courtroom clerk in department 220 at 415-551-3771 to arrange a date and time for the hearing. Counsel for the moving party should also provide courtesy copies of all filed papers on the motion to department 220 with a cover letter stating the date and time for the hearing.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Martin B. Greenbaum
Off Calendar Nov-16-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Arash Moussauon, Esq. 415-695-4545 (Information on contact sheet is not clear) specially appearing for Plaintiff/moving party.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court informs Counsel, motion is untimely and needs to be re-filed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DAVID LEUNG's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is Off calendar. Served and filed untimely. (See CCP 1005). Judge Pro Tem: Dianne Peebles, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)
